locator.quote: A cell passing 4 of 5 with day_pnl > -£50 = deploy candidate.

text: Deploy-candidate rule: a cell passing 4 of 5 acceptance metrics with day_pnl > -£50 is a deploy candidate.
The acceptance bar's opens/day target is 100–180, alongside mat% ≥ 5%, fc% ≤ 50%, day_pnl > -£100, and locked/σ_naked > 0.5.

locator.quote: day_pnl spreads less than ±£60 and mat% spreads less than ±2pp.

text: Seed-robustness rule: the base recipe is 'robust' if across seed re-runs day_pnl spreads less than ±£60 and mat% spreads less than ±2pp.
